title: The Betrayal Formation
slideshowTexts:
You catch a glimpse of it happening in a side street near the Temple treasury. Judas Iscariot slips away from the other disciples. He meets with two men in dark robes — Temple officials. Coins change hands. Thirty silver pieces. He nods. He smiles thinly.

No one else has seen this. The other disciples are a street away, talking among themselves. You are the only witness.

The betrayal is being arranged right now, in front of you.

choices.text: Do nothing. This was always going to happen.
Confront Judas directly. Tell him you know what he has agreed to do.
Run to warn Jesus immediately — tell him Judas has made an agreement with his enemies.
